name: Around San Diego — attractions + Esri UC offsite events

properties.name: Esri UC Party — Balboa Park
properties.desc: The big Esri UC celebration takes over Balboa Park's museums, gardens and plazas — food, music and exhibits across the park. Badge required; shuttles run from the convention center.

properties.name: Esri 5K Fun Run
properties.desc: The annual UC 5K along the downtown Embarcadero waterfront. Walk or run; sign-up is through the UC registration site.

properties.name: Map Gallery Reception — Sails Pavilion
properties.when: Tuesday evening · Convention Center, upper level
properties.desc: Opening reception in the Map Gallery at the Sails Pavilion — browse the printed maps from the global GIS community with food and drinks.

properties.name: Education Summit Reception
properties.desc: Networking reception for the Esri Education Summit attendees, next door at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina.

properties.name: Public Safety Summit
properties.desc: Esri's pre-conference summit for law enforcement, fire, EMS, 911 and emergency management — at the convention center the weekend before the main UC.

properties.name: San Diego Zoo
properties.desc: World-famous zoo in Balboa Park — 12,000+ animals across 100 acres of lush canyons.

properties.name: Balboa Park
properties.desc: 1,200-acre urban cultural park — 17 museums, Spanish-Renaissance architecture, gardens and the Botanical Building.

properties.name: USS Midway Museum
properties.desc: Step aboard the longest-serving U.S. Navy aircraft carrier of the 20th century, docked at Navy Pier.

properties.name: Gaslamp Quarter
properties.desc: 16 walkable blocks of Victorian-era buildings, restaurants, rooftop bars and nightlife — right outside the convention center.

properties.name: Seaport Village
properties.desc: Waterfront shops and eateries along the bay, a short walk from the convention center.

properties.name: Petco Park
properties.desc: Home of the San Diego Padres — check the schedule for a downtown ballgame steps from the Gaslamp.

properties.name: Little Italy
properties.desc: San Diego's buzziest food neighborhood — trattorias, a Saturday Mercato farmers market and Piazza della Famiglia.

properties.name: La Jolla Cove
properties.desc: Sea caves, sea lions and snorkeling in a protected cove ~20 min north. Sunset views over the bluffs.

properties.name: Coronado & Hotel del Coronado
properties.desc: Iconic Victorian beach resort and one of America's top-rated beaches, across the bay via the Coronado Bridge or ferry.

properties.name: Cabrillo National Monument
properties.desc: Tip of Point Loma — panoramic harbor views, the old lighthouse and tide pools.

properties.name: Old Town San Diego
properties.desc: The 'birthplace of California' — historic state park, Mexican restaurants and Día-de-los-Muertos color.

properties.name: Sunset Cliffs Natural Park
properties.desc: Dramatic ocean bluffs in Point Loma — the local spot for sunset.
